en.atmosphere: Kawasaki suburb on Odakyu Odawara line. Quiet residential, no shopping district.
en.landmarks: Nearby temple grounds. Residential quiet. Minimal attractions.
en.food: Very sparse. Noodle shops only. No restaurant clusters.

ja.atmosphere: 川崎市多摩区、小田急沿い。閑静な住宅街。

ru.atmosphere: Спальный Кавасаки на Одакю. Tiho, жилой район.
